name: unictl
description: Use unictl to connect Codex with Unity editor install, doctor, and lifecycle workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex to Unity through unictl
interface.longDescription: Install unictl into Unity projects, run doctor and editor lifecycle checks, and execute built-in editor workflows through a thin Codex wrapper.
defaultPrompt: Connect to a Unity project with unictl and run doctor before editing
